heading: Aire Valley vs Aireys Inlet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aire Valley, Victoria and Aireys Inlet, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Aire Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Aireys Inlet (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aire Valley or Aireys Inlet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aire Valley has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Aireys Inlet scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aire Valley scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Aireys Inlet scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aire Valley or Aireys Inlet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Aire Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
